category_sources: source_facts.description says JavaScript style guide with linter and automatic fixer; official GitHub README describes the same tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is standardjs.com; official repository and website brand the project as JavaScript Standard Style/StandardJS.
docs_sources: Official homepage is standardjs.com; official GitHub README contains usage documentation and a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official StandardJS homepage and GitHub README identify github.com/standard/standard as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify StandardJS as a JavaScript style guide, linter, and automatic code fixer.
